workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.desc: Select a floor range, generate a summary, confirm to inject.
workspace.filterFragmentsPlaceholder:
One keyword or fragment per line.
e.g.: think
comment
<!--img-prompt
workspace.filterHint: One keyword per line. 'think' removes <think>...</think> blocks; 'comment' removes HTML comments; exact fragments are deleted as-is.
workspace.noDraft: No pending summary. Confirmed summaries appear in the Summary tab.
segments.title: Summaries
segments.desc: Confirmed summaries accumulate here. The full text is used for injection.
settings.title: Settings
inject.title: Injection Settings
inject.enableDesc: When enabled, confirmed summary text is automatically injected into the conversation context.
inject.positionBeforeHint: Placed at the very beginning — lowest AI attention
inject.positionAfterHint: Next to character description — high AI attention
inject.positionChatHint: Inserted into chat history — closer to latest = more attention
inject.depthDesc: Only for 'Inside Chat Messages' mode. 0 = right next to latest message, higher = further back, less attention.
inject.wrapTagDesc: If set, injected content is wrapped in <tagname>...</tagname>. Some models pay extra attention to specific tags like paststory or context. Leave empty for no wrapping.
inject.attentionNote: Tip: Closer to the latest message = higher AI attention. For long-chat story summaries, try 'Character Definition' or 'Inside Chat, depth 1-4' with a wrapper tag for best results.
settings.promptHintNewUser: Tip: Start by picking a preset and templates. Only expand to edit the full prompts if you know what to change.
settings.fusionHint: Fusion has its own prompts, separate from main summarization.
toast.invalidRange: Please enter a valid floor range.
toast.promptBuiltInNoOverwrite: Built-in presets cannot be overwritten. Use 'Save As'.
toast.confirmClearAll: Clear all summaries? Injection content will also be cleared.
promptNote.builtInDirty: This is a built-in preset. Edits can't overwrite it — use 'Save As'.
promptNote.builtInClean: This is a built-in preset. Edit, then 'Save As' to keep changes.
promptNote.customDirty: Unsaved edits detected. Please 'Save' or 'Save As'.
promptNote.customClean: Custom preset — edits can be saved directly.
promptNote.discardConfirm: Unsaved edits will be lost. Switch anyway?
launcher.title: Open Memoir
